subcodes.first_line: O thou who speakest in remembrance of God! Within the reality of man the Hand of Divine bounty hath deposited a trust whereby man may become illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بذکر الهی در هویت انسان ید موهبت الهیه ودیعه گذاشته که بان انسان مطلع
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @human reality created in the image of God, @firmness in the Covenant
